metadata.title: Calisthenics Alliance
metadata.description: Calisthenics Alliance is a community of calisthenics enthusiasts.

hero.title: Calisthenics Alliance League
hero.description: A global competitive league for calisthenics athletes. Rankings and events in one place.

highlight.title: Real competition, real rankings
highlight.description: CAL brings structure to calisthenics competitions with standardized scoring and rankings.

rankings.title: Rankings
rankings.description: Track athlete performance across official competitions.

events.title: Live Events
events.description: Follow competitions and results in real time.

cta.title: Join the league
cta.description: Compete, track your progress, and rank among the best athletes worldwide.
